name: Can I get pain and suffering money for ladder fall at work?
description: Yes, via third-party suit, not comp.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: Can I get pain and suffering money for ladder fall at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, via third-party suit, not comp.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Not from workers' comp, but yes from third-party lawsuits against negligent parties like owners or GCs.[2][3]

Comp limits to economic; suits award non-economic damages.[1]

- Need provable fault.
- Severe injuries qualify higher.
- Multiplies total recovery.

Lawyer pursues if viable; many overlook this.[2]
